__AI_DOCUMENTATION__.original_file: The name of the file on GDrive. Use .mp4 extension.
__AI_DOCUMENTATION__.gdrive_url: Shared Google Drive link (Must be 'Anyone with link can view').
__AI_DOCUMENTATION__.new_title: Viral filename + #viralitypoly. Final videos are saved in 'output/' folder.
__AI_DOCUMENTATION__.segments: List of clips to CUT and JOIN. The FIRST clip is the HOOK.
__AI_DOCUMENTATION__.captions: Black text on Horizontal White Bar. Set 'start' and 'end'. If 'end' is not provided, the Agent extends the text until the next caption starts.
